channel.title: Bitcoin 101 on blog
channel.description: Recent content in Bitcoin 101 on blog

item.title: 4 / Is Bitcoin Safe
item.description: Dishonest actors on the Bitcoin network could try to rewrite the ledger so that they have more bitcoin. The Bitcoin software relies on cryptography to protect the ledger. The designer of bitcoin chose trusted cryptography techniques, and combined them in a creative way to build a security system. One of the main principles implemented is Proof of Work, a system which forces members of the network to spend computing power to compete for the right to write transactions to the ledger.

item.title: 3 / Why Bitcoin
item.description: If you are reading this, you probably live in a developed country whose financial system was designed in the 20th century, and has been relatively unchanged throughout your lifetime. Banks, financial institutions and governments in your country (in your lifetime) have always provided access to financial technology such as cheques, insurance, savings accounts, mortgages, credit checks, credit cards and debit cards. This is not the case for as many as 2.

item.title: 2 / Using bitcoin as money
item.description: Bitcoin keeps a ledger of transactions between participants on the Bitcoin network. The Bitcoin ledger was designed to be used as money, but a bitcoin transaction and the bitcoin network is independent from existing money and our financial and banking systems. When Andreas and Barry would like to conduct a transaction on the Bitcoin network, Andreas sends bitcoin from his address to Barry’s address, and the transaction is denominated in bitcoin units (BTC).

item.title: 1 / Bitcoin is software
item.description: Bitcoin is a piece of software which monitors and enables transactions between people who use the Bitcoin network. Participants of the network transact bitcoin with one another. The software allows the creation of a maximum of 21 million bitcoin, which are divisible to be more practical to use. The software runs simultaneously on the thousands or millions of computers of people who choose to participate in this network. The Bitcoin software is uniquely able to establish consensus between people using the network, without requiring trust.
